classes.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.DialogTransformersService

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.DialogTransformersService.plugins
documentation:
Return loaded transformers in priority order, such that modules with a
higher `priority` rank are called first and changes from lower ranked
transformers are applied last.

A plugin of `priority` 1 will override any existing context keys and
will be the last to modify `audio_data`

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.DialogTransformersService.shutdown
documentation: Shutdown all loaded plugins

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.DialogTransformersService.transform

documentation: transform dialogs before being sent to TTS

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.UtteranceTransformersService.plugins
documentation:
Return loaded transformers in priority order, such that modules with a
higher `priority` rank are called first and changes from lower ranked
transformers are applied last

A plugin of `priority` 1 will override any existing context keys and
will be the last to modify utterances`

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.transformers.MetadataTransformersService.plugins
documentation:
Return loaded transformers in priority order, such that modules with a
higher `priority` rank are called first and changes from lower ranked
transformers are applied last.

A plugin of `priority` 1 will override any existing context keys

classes.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol

documentation:
Lazily load and return the plugin options.

Returns:
    The loaded PluginOptions instance.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.add_listener
documentation:
Create and start a new listener for a connected client.

Args:
    client: The HiveMind client connection.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.stop_listener
documentation:
Stop and remove a listener for a disconnected client.

Args:
    client: The HiveMind client connection.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.handle_client_disconnected
documentation:
Handle a client disconnection event.

Args:
    client: The HiveMind client connection.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.get_tts
documentation:
Generate TTS audio for the given utterance.

Args:
    message (Message, optional): A Mycroft Message object containing the 'utterance' key.

Returns:
    str: Path to the generated audio file.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.get_b64_tts
documentation:
Generate TTS audio and return it as a Base64-encoded string.

Args:
    message (Message, optional): A Mycroft Message object containing the 'utterance' key.

Returns:
    str: Base64-encoded TTS audio data.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.transcribe_b64_audio
documentation:
Transcribe Base64-encoded audio data.

Args:
    message (Message, optional): A Mycroft Message object containing 'audio' (Base64) and optional 'lang'.

Returns:
    List[Tuple[str, float]]: List of transcribed utterances with confidence scores.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.handle_microphone_input
documentation:
Handle binary audio data input from the microphone.

Args:
    bin_data (bytes): Raw audio data.
    sample_rate (int): Sample rate of the audio.
    sample_width (int): Sample width of the audio.
    client (HiveMindClientConnection): Connection object for the client sending the data.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.handle_stt_transcribe_request
documentation:
Handle STT transcription request from binary audio data.

Args:
    bin_data (bytes): Raw audio data.
    sample_rate (int): Sample rate of the audio.
    sample_width (int): Sample width of the audio.
    lang (str): Language of the audio.
    client (HiveMindClientConnection): Connection object for the client sending the data.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.handle_stt_handle_request
documentation:
Handle STT utterance transcription and injection into the message bus.

Args:
    bin_data (bytes): Raw audio data.
    sample_rate (int): Sample rate of the audio.
    sample_width (int): Sample width of the audio.
    lang (str): Language of the audio.
    client (HiveMindClientConnection): Connection object for the client sending the data.

methods.name: hivemind_audio_binary_protocol.AudioReceiverProtocol.handle_inject_mycroft_msg
documentation:
Handle injection of Mycroft bus messages into the HiveMind system.

Args:
    message (Message): Mycroft bus message object.
    client (HiveMindClientConnection): Connection object for the client receiving the response.
Protocol for receiving and processing audio data in HiveMind.
